svg.title: Enterprise API & Event-Driven Integration Platform — Handwritten Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: A hand-drawn style architecture diagram showing all layers of the enterprise integration platform from clients at top through API Gateway, core microservices, event fabric, security, observability, and infrastructure at the bottom.
svg.text: routing · throttling · versioning · auth · SSL termination
③ core microservices — java 21 · spring boot · docker · ecs / eks
⑤ identity & access governance — zero trust model
maven multi-module · services/core-api · event-orchestration · transformation · partner-onboarding
spring profiles: local · dev · prod — docker-compose.local / dev / prod.yaml
